creator: yani@pi-greece.eu
text: Thanks for your comments. I'm currently using the ".asterisk.makeopts" feature to enable the ODBC option, however when there's a new ports tree update on the asterisk folder, it removes my customised file. This becomes a problem when using poudriere for automated builds and I forget to copy back the config file. Anyway, I understand the need to keep the Makefile options to the current number.
